source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The main water line into a tall building has a pressure of 600 kPa at 5 m below ground level. A pump brings the pressure up so that the water can be delivered at 200 kPa at the top floor 100 m above ground level. Assume a flow rate of 10 kg/s liquid water at 10\circ\text{C} and neglect any difference in kinetic energy and internal energy u. Find the pump work.
